name: Fresh Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove any visible seeds from the lemon. Chop the lemon and measure 1/4 cup; set aside.
2. Chop ginger until minced.
3. Chop garlic until minced.
4. Combine lemon, ginger, garlic, nectarines, raisins, brown sugar, vinegar, and curry powder in a medium saucepan; mix well.
5. Bring to a boil; boil for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Cool.
7. Add flaked coconut and cream of coconut; mix well.
8. Cover the chutney mixture and refrigerate overnight to allow flavors to blend.
